mapper.insert: insert into cert_issue_request ( cert_request_seq, cert_type_seq, users_id, request_reason ) values ( cert_request_seq.nextval, #{dto.cert_type_seq}, #{loginId}, #{dto.request_reason})
mapper.select: select count(*) from cert_issue_request where users_id = #{loginId} and cert_type_seq = #{dto.cert_type_seq} and ( status = 'PENDING' or status = 'APPROVED' and print_expires_at >= sysdate and nvl(printed_count, 0) < nvl(applied_max_print, 0) )

select cir.cert_request_seq, cir.cert_type_seq, cir.users_id, cir.request_reason, cir.status, cir.requested_at, cir.handle_id, cir.approved_at, cir.rejected_at, cir.reject_reason, cir.print_available_at, cir.print_expires_at, cir.applied_print_days, cir.applied_max_print, cir.printed_count, cir.created_at, cir.updated_at, cir.issue_date_code, cir.issue_no,
u.name, d.dept_name, r.rank_name, ct.cert_type_name,
hu.name as handler_name,
case when cir.status = 'APPROVED' then cir.approved_at when cir.status = 'REJECTED' then cir.rejected_at else null end as processed_at
from cert_issue_request cir
inner join cert_type ct on cir.cert_type_seq = ct.cert_type_seq inner join users u on cir.users_id = u.id
left join departments d on u.dept_seq = d.dept_seq left join rank r on u.rank_seq = r.rank_seq left join users hu on cir.handle_id = hu.id
order by case when cir.status = 'PENDING' then 1 else 2 end, cir.requested_at desc
mapper.update:
update cert_issue_request cir set cir.status = 'APPROVED', cir.handle_id = #{loginId}, cir.approved_at = sysdate, cir.print_available_at = sysdate,
cir.applied_print_days = ( select ct.print_days from cert_type ct where ct.cert_type_seq = cir.cert_type_seq ),
cir.applied_max_print = ( select ct.max_print_count from cert_type ct where ct.cert_type_seq = cir.cert_type_seq ),
cir.print_expires_at = sysdate + numtodsinterval( ( select ct.print_days from cert_type ct where ct.cert_type_seq = cir.cert_type_seq ), 'DAY' ),
cir.issue_date_code = to_char(sysdate, 'YYMMDD'), cir.issue_no = ( select nvl(max(issue_no), 0) + 1 from cert_issue_request where substr(issue_date_code, 1, 2) = to_char(sysdate, 'YY') ),
cir.updated_at = sysdate
where cir.cert_request_seq = #{cert_request_seq} and cir.status = 'PENDING'

update cert_issue_request set status = 'REJECTED', handle_id = #{loginId}, rejected_at = sysdate, reject_reason = #{reject_reason}, updated_at = sysdate where cert_request_seq = #{cert_request_seq} and status = 'PENDING'

update cert_issue_request set printed_count = nvl(printed_count, 0) + 1, updated_at = sysdate where cert_request_seq = #{cert_request_seq} and users_id = #{loginId} and status = 'APPROVED' and print_expires_at >= sysdate and nvl(printed_count, 0) < nvl(applied_max_print, 0)
